image_theme: Dark mode with high-contrast energetic accents

color_palette.name: Vibrant Orange
color_palette.usage: Mid-tones of the background gradient, 'manpm' lightning bolt logo, standard NPM diagram arrow

color_palette.name: Golden Flare
color_palette.usage: Brightest light source on the right, logo highlights, glowing hexagon outlines

color_palette.name: Pure White
color_palette.usage: Main 'manpm' text, 'M' logo base, Gopher eyes

color_palette.name: Soft Light Gray
color_palette.usage: Subtitle text ('The blazing-fast Golang orchestrator...'), diagram labels

color_palette.name: Dark Charcoal / Slate
color_palette.usage: Background panels for the two diagram UI boxes

color_palette.name: Electric Cyan
color_palette.usage: Top parallel arrows in the bottom diagram, Go Gopher body

color_palette.name: Coral Red
color_palette.usage: Bottom parallel arrow in the 'manpm (Parallel)' diagram

color_palette.name: Warm Beige / Tan
color_palette.usage: Package-lock.json document icon, package boxes, Go Gopher face and thumbs up

color_palette.name: Amber Glow
color_palette.usage: Transitional dark orange in the ambient background glow and disk bases
